text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are essentially flat over the past day, with BTC slightly negative while ETH holds steady, suggesting neither major is driving conviction in either direction. Extreme fear (12/100) combined with Bitcoin dominance near 56% and declining further over the week indicates investors are risk-averse and rotating toward larger-cap assets, though the relatively modest 24-hour volume of $78B suggests conviction behind the selling is not particularly strong. Smaller caps like Solana showing modest gains while the broader tone remains fearful reflects the typical pattern of flight-to-safety behavior rather than a coordinated market move.
